---
title: "Modern Robot Learning"
subtitle: "Course Website Demo"
---

Lecturer: [Yonghyeon Lee](https://www.gabe-yhlee.com)


## Syllabus
This course introduces modern learning-based methods for robot control,
starting from movement primitives and latent variable models, then moving
to stochastic and continuous-time generative policy learning, and finally
covering optimal control, reinforcement learning, and foundation models
for robotic decision-making and control.

### Lecture Schedule

| Date | Week | Lecture | Notes | Slides |
|---|---|---|---|---|
|  | Week 1 | Lecture 01: Introduction to Robot Learning |  | [Slides](slides/01-welcome.qmd)
|  | Week 1 | Lecture 02: Dynamic Movement Primitives | [Notes](notes/02-dynamic-movement-primitives.qmd) |  |
|  | Week 2 | Lecture 03: Learning Stable Dynamical Systems |  |  |
|  | Week 2 | Lecture 04: Autoencoders |  |  |
|  | Week 3 | Lecture 05: Variational Autoencoders |  |  |
|  | Week 3 | Lecture 06: Geometric Autoencoders |  |  |
|  | Week 4 | Lecture 07: Brownian Motion and Wiener Process |  |  |
|  | Week 4 | Lecture 08: Stochastic Differential Equations |  |  |
|  | Week 5 | Lecture 09: Score-Based Generative Models |  |  |
|  | Week 6 | Lecture 10: Diffusion Models and Diffusion Policy |  |  |
|  | Week 7 | Lecture 11: Neural ODEs |  |  |
|  | Week 8 | Lecture 12: Flow Matching for Robot Policy Learning |  |  |
|  | Week 9 | Lecture 13: Continuous-Time Optimal Control |  |  |
|  | Week 10 | Lecture 14: Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman Equations |  |  |
|  | Week 11 | Lecture 15: Discrete-Time Reinforcement Learning Foundations |  |  |
|  | Week 12 | Lecture 16: Policy Gradient Fundamentals |  |  |
|  | Week 13 | Lecture 17: REINFORCE and Variance Reduction |  |  |
|  | Week 14 | Lecture 18: Actor--Critic and Advanced Policy Optimization |  |  |
|  | Week 15 | Lecture 19: Reinforcement Learning for Robot Control |  |  |
|  | Week 16 | Lecture 20: Vision-Language-Action Models, World Models, and Robot Foundation Models |  |  |

Full notes index: [Lecture Notes](notes/index.qmd)<br>
Full slides index: [Lecture Slides](slides/index.qmd)
